title: Portable Handoff Artifact
description: Structured data passed between agents at workflow step boundaries. Designed to be small, self-describing, and compaction-resilient.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the handoff artifact schema

from_agent.description: Name of the agent that produced this artifact

to_agent.description: Name of the agent that should receive this artifact

workflow_step.description: Workflow step id that produced this artifact

summary.description: Single-paragraph natural-language summary of what was done

key_decisions.description: At most 5 decisions made during the step

files_modified.description: At most 10 files created or modified

files_read.description: At most 20 files consulted (optional, useful for audit)

next_action.description: What the receiving agent should do first

artifacts.description: Paths to artifacts (reports, JSON outputs) produced by this step

schema_outputs.description: Structured outputs matching declared task output schema (optional)

verdict.description: For review steps only: the review verdict

verdict_reason.description: Explanation of the verdict (required when verdict is reject, blocked, or escalate)

metrics.description: Operational metrics captured during step execution (typically populated by harness)

allOf.description: Verdict reason required when verdict is not approve
